_meta.description: Tournament-relevant trainer rosters scraped from Bulbapedia. Each trainer has one or more rosters keyed by the games that share that roster.
_meta.scope: Gym Leaders, Elite Four, Champion, Rival(s) — for the games covered by this app (GSC, RSE, FRLG).

fields.role: Gym Leader | Elite Four | Champion | Rival
fields.specialty: Type the trainer specializes in (or null for rivals/champions)
fields.rosters: Array of {games: [game keys], team: [...]}. Multiple entries when within a family there's variation (e.g. Emerald differs from R/S).
fields.team[i].moves: Moveset Bulbapedia lists for that game version. May be incomplete on Bulbapedia for older games — verify if exact moves matter.

trainers.name: Falkner
trainers.title: The Elegant Master of Flying Pokémon
